headline: Nextech3D.ai Integrates AI‑Enabled Hotel Booking with HotelPlanner Using Expedia and Priceline to Extend Event Technology Platform Monetization
summary: AI‑enabled hotel booking integration leverages HotelPlanner infrastructure and Expedia, Priceline, Kayak, Hotels.com, Booking.com inventory to embed lodging and event‑driven travel commerce across Nextech's event technology platform TORONTO, ON / ...
